overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character with a flashlight exploring a foggy, overgrown rural property at night. The character ascends wooden stairs through tall grass, crosses an abandoned yard with derelict vehicles, enters a house, explores dimly lit interior rooms including a child's bedroom and kitchen, then exits to a back porch.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden walkway through overgrown marsh grass

events.description: reaches top of stairs and emerges into open yard area

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs through dense tall grass, sweeping flashlight across vegetation

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a raised path through the grass
dense overgrown vegetation taller than the character
painted wooden handrail along the walkway
derelict vehicle partially hidden in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wooden walkway surrounded by dense tall grass in a foggy night, using a flashlight to illuminate the path. The environment is narrow and enclosed by vegetation until reaching the top of the stairs where an abandoned car becomes visible in the yard ahead.

agents.ego_description: walking through overgrown yard past abandoned cars and blue trash bins, approaching the house

entered.detail: large blue plastic garbage containers
multiple derelict vehicles scattered in the yard
corrugated metal siding of the rural house
sparse trees visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Moving through an overgrown yard with abandoned vehicles and blue trash bins, the character approaches a house in the fog. The spatial layout opens up from the narrow walkway to a wider area with scattered derelict cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: house exterior with propane tank and porch

events.description: opens front door and enters the house interior

agents.ego_description: walking along house exterior past propane tank and white fence, then entering through front door

entered.detail: white cylindrical propane tank with red cap
short white wooden fence sections near the house
white door with semi-circular window
dark entrance leading into the house

segments.scene_description: Character walks along the house exterior past a propane tank and white picket fence, then opens the front door and enters the dimly lit interior, transitioning from outdoor fog to indoor darkness.

events.description: enters child's bedroom with dollhouse and posters

agents.ego_description: exploring living room with couch and dining table, then kitchen with stove and cabinets, flashlight revealing details

entered.detail: green sofa against the wall
table with white tablecloth and bottles
white oven and stovetop with bottles on counter
wooden upper and lower cabinets
wooden dollhouse furniture under window
posters on wall including 'Sassy Spring'

segments.scene_description: Exploring the interior living spaces including a living room with a green couch and dining table, a kitchen with wooden cabinets and stove, and finally entering a child's bedroom with a dollhouse and posters on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: hallway and master bedroom with wood paneling

events.description: approaches back door leading to porch

agents.ego_description: moving through hallway into wood-paneled bedroom with cardboard boxes, then toward bathroom and back door

entered.detail: narrow corridor connecting rooms
dark wood paneling covering walls
bed with boxes stacked on it
stacked moving boxes
white sink with mirror above
door leading to exterior porch

segments.scene_description: Moving through interior hallways into a wood-paneled bedroom with cardboard boxes and a bed, then approaching a bathroom area and the back door leading outside.

events.description: exits house through back door onto porch

agents.ego_description: exiting through back door onto porch with plastic table and chairs, looking out to foggy back yard

entered.detail: wooden deck with white railing
white plastic patio table
white plastic patio chairs
foggy grassy area behind the house

segments.scene_description: Character exits through the back door onto a small porch with white plastic furniture, stepping back out into the foggy night air and looking over the back yard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, overgrown path into the dark interior of a rural home. It begins with the character ascending a wooden walkway enveloped in dense tall grass and thick night fog, with a flashlight cutting through the narrow vegetation. As the character reaches the top of the stairs, the environment opens into a wider, derelict yard scattered with abandoned vehicles and blue trash bins. The camera then tracks along the house exterior, passing a propane tank and a white picket fence before the character opens the front door. The scene finally shifts from the hazy outdoor atmosphere into the oppressive darkness of the dimly lit interior.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the claustrophobic interior of a derelict home that eventually opens up into the foggy night air. It begins by navigating the living spaces, gliding past a green couch and dining table before passing through a kitchen with wooden cabinets and entering a child's bedroom filled with posters and a dollhouse. The camera then shifts through narrow hallways into a wood-paneled bedroom cluttered with cardboard boxes, moving steadily toward a bathroom area and the rear exit. As the character reaches the back door, the scene expands from the dim interior onto a small porch furnished with white plastic chairs. Finally, the camera steps outside, transitioning from the enclosed house back into the dense, enveloping fog of the backyard.
